summary: Align runtime with JSONL-vault daily and folder conventions
description: Detect daily notes only as daily/YYYY-MM-DD.md, prefer latest daily as first item, aggregate folders by top-level folder, and expose vault size bytes.
acceptance: daily/YYYY-MM-DD.md detected; old 10_notes/*-daily.md no longer drives daily calendar; folders list top-level paths; vault_size_bytes available

evidence.summary: Implemented daily/YYYY-MM-DD.md detection, latest daily first-item preference, top-level folder aggregation, vault_size_bytes stats; verified by npm run check and runtime_flow tests.
